arguments.argument: var tNewAttack; tNewAttack=instance_create(x+lengthdir_x(16,image_angle),y+lengthdir_y(16,image_angle),oNormalBullet) tNewAttack.sprite_index=sprite_index; tNewAttack.atkPower=6; tNewAttack.bulletSpeed=5; tNewAttack.image_angle=image_angle tNewAttack.direction=image_angle; tNewAttack.image_blend=c_orange
